Verification: built the launcher and confirmed \ and \ print the package.json version with no update banner output when FOOLERY_APP_DIR points at the repo checkout.
Caveat: full Vitest execution is blocked in this environment because the local npm install produced empty dev-package directories and \ is not installed for the repo hooks/toolchain.
